items.caption: A male doctor, wearing a green shirt and glasses, is using a tongue depressor to examine the throat of a young boy. The boy is wearing a white shirt and has blonde hair. The doctor is standing behind the boy, who is sitting in a chair. The doctor is holding the tongue depressor in his right hand, and the boy is holding the tongue depressor in his mouth. The doctor is looking at the boy's throat with a stethoscope in his left hand. The background is a plain white wall.
